title: About Us
note: Provides company-level positioning for CSX as a rail-based freight transportation supplier in North America.

title: Network and Operations
note: Documents the scale and operating footprint of CSX's rail network, including route miles, served regions, and asset context.

title: CSX 2024 Annual Report
note: Primary annual filing source for business description, risk context, operating segments, and 2024 financial performance.

title: CSX Corp. Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Results
note: Summarizes 2024 revenue, operating income, net income, and year-over-year financial performance.

title: CSX Corporation Market Cap & Net Worth
note: Market-data source for refreshed CSX market capitalization around the May 2026 review window.

title: CSX Corporation Stock Price & Overview
note: Market-data source for valuation inputs including trailing P/E ratio and profile-level financial metrics.

title: OpenRailwayMap GitHub Organization
note: Open-source railway infrastructure mapping project based on OpenStreetMap data, used as an open infrastructure-data alternative.

title: Copyright and Licence
note: Documents OpenStreetMap's open data license basis under the Open Data Commons Open Database License.

title: The Digital Age of Railcar Tracking Has Arrived
note: Describes RailPulse as a neutral, open-architecture industry railcar telematics platform for shared freight visibility.

title: RailPulse Launches Signature Platform to Transform Railcar Telematics
note: Documents launch and capabilities of RailPulse's railcar telematics platform, including near real-time data and visibility goals.

title: openTCS - The Open Transportation Control System
publisher: Fraunhofer Institute for Material Flow and Logistics
note: Open-source control-system reference for automated material-flow and terminal-adjacent coordination concepts.
